"use client"; import React from 'react'; export default function GeneratedScreen() { return (
{/* Logo */}
Qahwati
{/* Desktop Menu */}
Features How it Works Pricing FAQ
{/* CTA */}

Manage Your Traditional Café with
Smart Professionalism

The all-in-one POS solution tailored for modern coffee shops and traditional lounges. Simplified ordering, precise inventory, and insightful reports.

{/* Dashboard Mockup */}
{/* Decorative background elements */}

Powerful Capabilities

Built for the Modern Barista

{/* Feature 1 */}

Table Management

Visualize your café floor. Drag & drop tables, manage occupancy, and split bills with ease.

{/* Feature 2 */}

Order System

Direct communication between the counter and kitchen. Reduce errors and speed up service.

{/* Feature 3 */}

E-Payments

Support for cards, Apple Pay, and local digital wallets. Seamless checkout experience.

{/* Feature 4 */}

Inventory

Track beans, milk, and supplies in real-time. Automatic low-stock alerts so you never run out.

{/* Feature 5 */}

Cash Register

End-of-day reconciliation and cash flow monitoring. Secure and accountable logging.

{/* Feature 6 */}

Smart Reports

Deep insights into best-selling drinks, busiest hours, and profit margins through analytics.

Start in 3 Simple Steps

Get your café up and running with Qahwati in under an hour.

{/* Connecting Line */}
{/* Step 1 */}
1

Register

Create your account and input your café's basic details and location.

{/* Step 2 */}
2

Add Menu & Tables

Upload your product list and design your floor plan with our simple editor.

{/* Step 3 */}
3

Start Managing

Begin taking orders, accepting payments, and viewing growth reports.

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Choose the plan that fits your café's current size.

{/* Basic */}

Free

For small carts & home brew.

$0 /mo
  • 1 Register
  • Standard Reports
  • Email Support
{/* Pro (Featured) */}
Most Popular

Pro

For growing professional cafés.

$49.99 /mo
  • Unlimited Tables
  • Inventory Management
  • Advanced Analytics
  • 24/7 Priority Support
{/* Enterprise */}

Enterprise

For café chains & franchises.

$99.99 /mo
  • Multi-Location Dashboard
  • Custom API Access
  • White-label Features

Trusted by 500+ Local Cafés

{/* Testimonial 1 */}
★★★★★

"Qahwati transformed our morning rush. What used to be chaos is now a smooth, professional process. Our staff loves the intuitive interface."

Ahmed Al-Sayed

The Beanery Cafe

{/* Testimonial 2 */}
★★★★★

"The inventory tracking is a life-saver. I've reduced my waste by 15% in just three months. Highly recommend for any serious café owner."

Sarah Mansour

Golden Roast

{/* Testimonial 3 */}
★★★★★

"Support is exceptional. Whenever we have a question, the team is there to help. It truly feels like a partnership, not just a software."

Omar Khalid

Artisan Coffee Co.

Frequently Asked Questions

{/* FAQ 1 */}
Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial on our Pro plan with no credit card required. You can also stay on our Free plan forever if your needs are basic.
{/* FAQ 2 */}
Qahwati works on any modern tablet, iPad, or desktop computer via a web browser. We also support most standard Bluetooth receipt printers and cash drawers.
{/* FAQ 3 */}
We use industry-standard SSL encryption and host our servers on highly secure cloud infrastructure. Your data is backed up daily and strictly confidential.

Ready to modernize your café?

Join hundreds of successful café owners who trust Qahwati for their daily operations.

{/* About Column */}
Qahwati

The leading SaaS POS solution designed specifically for traditional and modern café cultures across the region.

{/* Links Column 1 */}
Quick Links
  • Features
  • Pricing
  • Dashboard
  • Hardware Store
{/* Links Column 2 */}
Support
  • Help Center
  • API Documentation
  • Privacy Policy
  • Terms of Service
{/* Contact Column */}
Contact Us
  • hello@qahwati.com
  • +971 4 000 0000
{/* Bottom Bar */}

© 2024 Qahwati (قهوتي). All rights reserved.

Crafted for the lovers of coffee and efficiency.

Qahwati

Features Pricing About Contact

{/* Gradient Background */}
Now in Public Beta

Manage Your Traditional Café with Smart Professionalism

An integrated ecosystem for tables, orders, payments, inventory, and automated financial reports designed specifically for modern coffee culture.

Core Capabilities

Everything you need to run your café

Streamline your daily operations with our comprehensive suite of tools built for the fast-paced environment of traditional coffee shops.

{/* Feature 1 */}

Table Management

Real-time floor plans and live table status tracking. Know exactly which tables are occupied or ready for service.

{/* Feature 2 */}

Order System

Digital ordering system synchronized with the kitchen. Reduce wait times and eliminate communication errors.

{/* Feature 3 */}

E-Payments

Seamlessly accept all major cards and digital wallets with built-in security and instant transaction verification.

{/* Feature 4 */}

Inventory

Automated stock tracking and low-inventory alerts. Manage your coffee beans and supplies with surgical precision.

{/* Feature 5 */}

Cash Register

A secure, blazingly fast point-of-sale interface optimized for peak hours and heavy traffic.

{/* Feature 6 */}

Smart Reports

Gain deep insights into your business performance with automated financial analytics and sales trends.

Simple, transparent pricing

Choose the plan that fits your café's growth.

{/* Free Plan */}

Free

$0 /month

Perfect for small kiosks or side-businesses starting out.

Basic table tracking
50 orders/month
Single user

Most Popular

Unlimited tables
